name: Nancy Reagan's Vienna Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and 1/2 cup sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Beat in egg yolks.
3. Add flour and salt; knead with fingers.
4. Pat batter into a greased 9x9 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from oven and spread with jelly.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff.
8. Fold in remaining sugar and nuts.
9. Spread on top of jelly.
10. Return pan to oven and bake an additional 25 minutes.
11. Cut into squares while still warm. Makes about 2 dozen.
